name: AI Fitness Coach
summary: A bilingual camera-based squat coach that counts reps, detects common squat form issues, and summarizes training sessions.
target_user: Mobile users who want immediate squat form feedback without wearing extra sensors.
core_problem: Users need reliable rep counting and simple coaching cues during camera-based squat practice.
primary_loop: Perform squats with real-time local form cues
Open history, detail, or library views

features.name: Camera squat session
acceptance: A user can start and exit camera detection
The session can pause and resume

features.name: Session review
acceptance: A user can view counted exercise stats after a session
A user can open workout details and history

features.name: Exercise library
acceptance: A user can start a supported exercise from the library

features.name: English / Chinese switch
acceptance: A user can switch product copy between English and Chinese without leaving the app

audio.mood: No BGM. Voice feedback is generated by browser speech synthesis.

exclusions: Decorative controls outside the interaction map
